mainEntity.name: What is the fee for gst audit chartered accountant?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fees vary based on complexity and dispute amount. We offer transparent fixed-fee pricing. Contact Virtual Auditor at +91-99622 60333 for a customised quote. Initial consultation is free.

mainEntity.name: What is the time limit for filing gst audit chartered accountant?

acceptedAnswer.text: GST appeals must be filed within 3 months from the date of the order (Section 107). Tribunal appeals within 3 months of the appellate order. Late filing requires condonation of delay. Contact us immediately upon receiving an adverse order.

mainEntity.name: Can Virtual Auditor represent me at GST hearings in Chennai?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. CA V. Viswanathan (FCA) is authorised to represent assessees before GST Appellate Authorities, GST Tribunal, and adjudicating officers. We handle the entire process — from drafting to hearing representation.
